raw_consumer_statement: We have disputed this amount with XXXX XXXX a rental car company charged our card even though we dropped of the car with normal wear and the rental company inspected the car in our presence upon drop off and said everything was good. This is futher information on our dispute : We rented a car in XXXX XXXX from XX/XX/year> to XX/XX/year>. We returned the car free of trash with normal wear from our travels. There was a minor amount of sand in the car from the normal use of the car in XXXX XXXX. We dropped off the car and they inspected it and said everything was good. A couple of hours later after we left I received an email saying that they were charging me a cleaning fee. Our car was returned with normal use in California- it was nowhere near excessively dirty. All car rental companies clean each car after use. They are not authorized to charge our card for any cleaning fees. The agreement does not list anything about cleaning fees for normal use- they also inspected the car upon arrival and said everything was in good condition.
